decision_commentary: All required fields present: contractor_pricing_source (documented — 2 local BCS contractors with coastal residential experience), contractor_total (MXN 8,200,000), client_budget (MXN 9,907,480 from cost-basis.json), variance_amount (-1,707,480), variance_pct (-17.2%), recommendation (proceed). Math verified: 8,200,000 - 9,907,480 = -1,707,480; -1,707,480 / 9,907,480 = -17.2% correct. Recommendation matches data — contractor pricing below budget, no value engineering needed. Recommendation rationale explains the variance: conservative benchmark vs efficient local contractors. Pool and solar quoted separately as specialist subcontractors and within budget range. No redesign required. Proceed decision is unambiguous. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707830703243 confirmed in state.json (budget_alignment task). No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: Celia DG-09 routing verified in separate scorecard.
